Meet the Practitioner

Wellness, treated as a clinical craft.

Evidence-led protocols. Unhurried consultations. Care that listens first.

Solutions by House of Kallos was founded with a single belief: wellness deserves the same clinical rigour as any other medical discipline. Behind every drip is careful sourcing, a sterile setup, and a practitioner who actually listens.

I don't sell drips. I help people figure out what their body actually needs.

Every protocol is evidence-led, every consultation unhurried, and every aftercare follow-up genuinely personal.
